summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Assessment Engine (محرك التقييمات) for NASSAQ School Management System - Iteration 12. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The assessment system is fully functional including: assessment creation, filters (class/subject/type), grade entry dialog, bulk grade saving, class overview tab, and student history tab.
passed_tests: Backend: Login as school principal - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/assessments - Returns assessment list
Backend: GET /api/assessments?class_id={id} - Filter by class works
Backend: GET /api/assessments?subject_id={id} - Filter by subject works
Backend: GET /api/assessments?assessment_type=quiz - Filter by type works
Backend: POST /api/assessments - Creates new assessment
Backend: POST /api/assessments - Different types (assignment, exam, participation) work
Backend: GET /api/assessments/{id} - Returns single assessment
Backend: GET /api/assessments/students-for-grading/{id} - Returns students with grades
Backend: POST /api/grades/bulk - Creates/updates grades for multiple students
Backend: Grades persistence verified via GET students-for-grading
Backend: GET /api/grades/class/{id}/overview - Returns class statistics
Backend: GET /api/grades/class/{id}/overview?subject_id={id} - Filter works
Backend: GET /api/grades/student/{id} - Returns student grade history
Backend: GET /api/grades/student/{id}?subject_id={id} - Filter works
Backend: PUT /api/assessments/{id} - Updates assessment
Backend: DELETE /api/assessments/{id} - Deletes assessment
Backend: GET nonexistent assessment returns 404
Backend: GET students-for-grading with invalid ID returns 404
Frontend: Assessment page /admin/assessments loads without errors
Frontend: data-testid='assessment-page' found
Frontend: 'تقييم جديد' (New Assessment) button works
Frontend: Class filter dropdown works
Frontend: Subject filter dropdown works
Frontend: 3 tabs present (التقييمات, نظرة عامة, السجلات)
Frontend: Create assessment dialog opens and closes
Frontend: Assessment form fields work (title, type, max_score, weight, date, description)
Frontend: Assessment creation shows success toast
Frontend: Assessment list displays with correct columns
Frontend: 'الدرجات' (Grades) button opens grade entry dialog
Frontend: Grade entry dialog shows students with score inputs
Frontend: Grade entry with notes works
Frontend: 'حفظ الدرجات' (Save Grades) button works
Frontend: Overview tab shows class statistics (average, highest, lowest)
Frontend: Overview tab shows grade distribution chart
Frontend: History tab shows student grade records
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentPage.jsx correctly implements all assessment features with proper data-testid attributes
Backend APIs properly handle assessment CRUD operations
Bulk grade entry with upsert logic works correctly
Class overview API returns proper statistics (average, highest, lowest, grade distribution)
Student grade history API returns grades grouped by subject and type
All 9 assessment types supported: quiz, assignment, exam, participation, project, midterm, final, oral, practical
RTL Arabic layout is properly implemented throughout the page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Assessment Engine is fully functional. All APIs working: POST /api/assessments, GET /api/assessments (with filters), GET /api/assessments/{id}, PUT /api/assessments/{id}, DELETE /api/assessments/{id}, GET /api/assessments/students-for-grading/{id}, POST /api/grades/bulk, GET /api/grades/class/{id}/overview, GET /api/grades/student/{id}. The page has 3 tabs: التقييمات (Assessments), نظرة عامة (Overview), السجلات (History). Class 'الرابع الابتدائي - أ' has 2 students with grades entered. Assessment types supported: quiz, assignment, exam, participation, project, midterm, final, oral, practical.

create_assessment.form_fields: title, type, max_score, weight, date, description - ✓ All working

assessment_list.columns: العنوان, النوع, المادة, التاريخ, الدرجة, الحالة, الإجراءات

tabs.overview: نظرة عامة - ✓ Working (shows class average, highest, lowest, grade distribution)
